Selected original:
- NotoSansJP-Regular.ttf
  SHA256 D930D5D52D15231C283089760F84584272AD5E37E14607BA0D19C798E7A9CAEC

Runtime copy:
- third_party/noto-sans-jp/selected-originals/NotoSansJP-Regular.ttf
  -> assets/fonts/noto_sans_jp/NotoSansJP-Regular.ttf

The TTF bytes are unchanged. The font is bundled with the game and is not
loaded from an OS font directory. The full OFL 1.1 license is stored in
OFL.txt.
